summary: Social Field Expansion Phase Testing Complete - 100% pass rate. All 6 new backend APIs working, all frontend components rendering correctly. Tab navigation shows 6 tabs in correct RTL order. Community tab displays MissionsSection, CirclesSection, and LeadersSection. Feed tab shows 5 card types. Home tab includes GlobalFieldDashboard and CompassAISection.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly set for testing
RTL layout is correctly implemented for Hebrew text
Join buttons properly update participant counts via API
All 6 new section components export correctly from index.js
test_credentials: Anonymous user (no auth required for most endpoints)
seed_data_creation: None required - demo agents generate continuous activity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Field Expansion phase complete. Backend endpoints tested: /api/orientation/field-dashboard (dominant_direction, total_actions_today, active_regions, direction_counts, top_regions), /api/orientation/missions (4 missions with progress), /api/orientation/missions/join (POST), /api/orientation/value-circles (6 circles), /api/orientation/value-circles/join (POST), /api/orientation/leaders (global_leaders array with 10 ranked leaders), /api/orientation/compass-ai/{user_id} (suggestion_he, balance_score), /api/orientation/feed/for-you/{user_id} (15 cards with 5 types). Frontend testids: tab-navigation, tab-home, tab-feed, tab-community, tab-insights, tab-theory, tab-history, global-field-dashboard, compass-ai-section, missions-section, circles-section, leaders-section, feed-tab, feed-card-action, feed-card-mission, feed-card-question, feed-card-reflection, join-mission-*, join-circle-*, leader-*.

TabNavigation.6_tabs_in_RTL_order: PASS - בית, פיד, קהילה, תובנות, תיאוריה, היסטוריה

HomeTab.global-field-dashboard: PASS - Shows 53 actions today, order dominant, 19 regions
HomeTab.compass-ai-section: PASS - Shows suggestion for new users

CommunityTab.missions-section: PASS - 4 missions with progress bars and Join buttons
CommunityTab.circles-section: PASS - 6 circles in 2-column grid with Join buttons
CommunityTab.leaders-section: PASS - 7 leaders with rank, alias, country, impact

JoinInteractions.join_mission_button: PASS - POST succeeds, participant count updates
JoinInteractions.join_circle_button: PASS - POST succeeds, member count updates

GET /api/orientation/compass-ai/{user_id.suggestion_he: בצע את הפעולה הראשונה שלך כדי לקבל ניתוח מצפן.
